title: Natural Language Processing for Code Understanding
description: This research explores the application of transformer-based large language models to understand, summarize, and generate code across multiple programming languages.
abstract: We present a novel approach using pre-trained language models fine-tuned on code corpora to perform downstream tasks including code summarization, bug detection, and automated test generation. Our experiments show state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks.

title: Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive Systems
description: An investigation into reinforcement learning techniques for building adaptive software systems that improve over time based on user feedback and environmental signals.
abstract: This paper presents a framework for integrating reinforcement learning into production software systems, enabling continuous self-optimization. We demonstrate its effectiveness on scheduling and resource allocation problems.
